name: IdsEdwPrmRateAgeCatDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS (SELECT PRIM_RATE_AGE_CAT.PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_SK AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_SK CASE WHEN RTRIM(LTRIM(COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,''))) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE RTRIM(LTRIM(COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,''))) END AS SRC_SYS_CD, PRIM_RATE_AGE_CAT.AGE_BAND_REF_ID AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_BAND_REF_ID, PRIM_RATE_AGE_CAT.AGE_FROM_NO AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_AGE_FROM_NO, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, PRIM_RATE_AGE_CAT.AGE_THRU_NO AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_AGE_THRU_NO, PRIM_RATE_AGE_CAT.PRM_1_AMT AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_1_AMT, PRIM_RATE_AGE_CAT.PRM_2_AMT AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_2_AMT, PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT.PRM_3_AMT AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_3_AMT, PRIM_RATE_AGE_CAT.PRM_4_AMT AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_4_AMT, PRIM_RATE_AGE_CAT.PRM_5_AMT AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_5_AMT, PRIM_RATE_AGE_CAT.PRM_6_AMT AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_6_AMT, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT PRIM_RATE_AGE_CAT LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON PRIM_RATE_AGE_CAT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE PRIM_RATE_AGE_CAT.PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_SK <> 0 AND PRIM_RATE_AGE_CAT.PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_SK <> 1), cte_unk AS (SELECT 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01 00:00:00.000000' AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_BAND_REF_ID, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_AGE_FROM_NO, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_AGE_THRU_NO, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_1_AMT, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_2_AMT, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_3_AMT, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_4_AMT, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_5_AMT, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_6_AMT, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), cte_na AS (SELECT 1 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01 00:00:00.000000' AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_BAND_REF_ID, 1 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_AGE_FROM_NO, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_AGE_THRU_NO, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_1_AMT, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_2_AMT, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_3_AMT, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_4_AMT, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_5_AMT, 0 AS PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_PRM_6_AMT, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT * FROM cte_main UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_unk UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_na

Annotations:
This is Source extract data from an IDS table and apply Code denormalization, create a load ready file.

Job Name:
IdsEdwPrmRateAgeCatDExtr
Read from source table PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT from IDS and join on code mapping table to bring SRC_SYS_CD;
Full Extract From the Source Table
This is a load ready file conforms to the target table structure.

Write PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT_D Data into a Sequential file for Load Job.
Add Defaults and Null Handling
